_note: Backend-served help. In UiPath this becomes the Data Service `HelpContent` entity that the [i] info button and 'Take the tour' control bind to. Nothing here is hardcoded in the frontend.

screens.title: Dashboard
screens.whatItIs: Every discharge case and its live readiness status. Green = proven ready; red = a dependency failed rehearsal; amber = waiting on a human.
screens.howToUse: Pick a case and click 'Run Rehearsal' to fork a disposable twin and test the plan before anyone acts.
screens.nextStep: Open a case to see its plan and obligations.

tourSteps.text: Each row is a real case from the backend (Data Service). No data is typed into this screen.
Status updates live as the Maestro process runs.
This triggers the Preflight rehearsal for the selected case.

screens.title: Case detail
screens.whatItIs: The patient's plan (medications, pharmacy, transport, follow-up, instructions) and the obligations compiled from it.
screens.howToUse: Review the obligations the compiler derived from policy. Each one becomes an executable test.
screens.nextStep: Run a rehearsal to prove or break these obligations.

tourSteps.text: Promises in the discharge plan — the raw material.
Executable outcome obligations compiled from the plan + policy (grounded, not invented).

screens.title: Rehearsal (live)
screens.whatItIs: A live view of the rehearsal: forking the twin, compiling obligations, the chaos agent's attacks, and Test Cloud execution.
screens.howToUse: Watch the chaos agent search for failure combinations and see which obligations break.
screens.nextStep: If anything fails, you'll be routed to Nurse review; if all pass, the plan is released.

tourSteps.text: The six rehearsal steps, updating in real time from process state.
Each adversarial attempt the chaos agent makes, and what it found.

screens.title: Evidence pack
screens.whatItIs: The proof: the causal failure chain, every obligation result, the audit trail, and the final verdict.
screens.howToUse: Trace exactly why the plan was blocked or released. Download the proof for the record.
screens.nextStep: Use this as the auditable record of the decision.

tourSteps.text: The chain of dependencies that led to the failure (e.g., transport late -> pharmacy closed -> med not collected).
Export the evidence pack for governance/audit.

screens.title: Nurse review
screens.whatItIs: The human gate. The blocked obligation, the proposed OPERATIONAL remedy, and your decision.
screens.howToUse: Approve the remedy, edit it, or accept a documented exception. Clinical decisions stay with you.
screens.nextStep: On approval, Preflight re-runs the rehearsal automatically.

tourSteps.text: An operational fix proposed by an agent — never a clinical decision.
Approve, edit, or accept a documented exception with your name on it.

screens.title: Regression library
screens.whatItIs: Resolved failures promoted into reusable standing tests, so the same gap can't recur silently.
screens.howToUse: Toggle scenarios to include them in future rehearsals.
screens.nextStep: Stronger coverage on every future case.

tourSteps.text: Each entry was learned from a real blocked case.
